instruction: Reset the position of the red side stripe on the identification icon. (subtler offset — read the original coordinates carefully).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/identification.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 9h3.75M15 12h3.75M15 15h3.75M4.5 19.5h15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 19.5 4.5h-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 19.5Zm6-10.125a1.875 1.875 0 1 1-3.75 0 1.875 1.875 0 0 1 3.75 0Zm1.294 6.336a6.721 6.721 0 0 1-3.17.789 6.721 6.721 0 0 1-3.168-.789 3.376 3.376 0 0 1 6.338 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="20" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
target_svg:
